items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: MSC Income reports Q1 2026 results, NII of $0.35/share, NAV $15.87
items.snippet: MSC Income Fund posted Q1 2026 NII of $0.35/share and NAV of $15.87/share, and declared a $0.35 regular quarterly plus $0.01 supplemental dividend.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: MSC Income switches to monthly dividends, declares $0.11/share for July-September 2026
items.snippet: MSC Income Fund announces a shift from quarterly to monthly dividends beginning July 2026, declaring $0.11/share monthly for Q3 2026 and a $0.03 supplemental dividend.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: MSC Income originates $38.9M in new private loan commitments in Q1 2026
items.snippet: MSC Income Fund originated $38.9 million in new or increased private loan commitments and funded total investments in Q1 2026.

items.title: 8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Material Off-Balance-Sheet Obligation · Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: MSC Income closes $150M investment grade notes offering at 6.34%
items.snippet: MSC Income Fund closed a private notes offering of $150 million at a fixed rate of 6.34% per year.

items.headline_ai: MSC Income reports Q4 2025 NII of $0.28/share, ANII of $0.34/share

items.snippet: MSC Income Fund declared a regular quarterly dividend of $0.35/share and a $0.01 supplemental dividend, both payable May 1, 2026.

items.snippet: MSC Income Fund appointed Nataly Marks, President of Triple-S Steel Holdings, as a new independent board director and Audit Committee member.

items.snippet: MSC Income Fund closed its NYSE IPO, selling 5.5 million shares of common stock at $15.53 per share with underwriters fully exercising their overallotment option.
